name: Get Nice Financial Group Limited
summary: Get Nice Financial Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial services in Hong Kong. It operates through three segments: Broking, Securities Margin Financing, and Corporate Finance. The company offers securities dealing and broking, futures and options broking, and underwriting and placement services; securities margin financing; and corporate finance and advisory services. In addition, it is involved in the provision of asset management services, as well as property and yacht holding activities. The company is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Get Nice Financial Group Limited operates as a subsidiary of Get Nice Holdings Limited.
